about.description: Global financial super app with 70M+ customers

values.name: Never Settle
values.tagline: We never settle for good enough. We can always go 10x from here.
values.description: Always in startup mode, always building. Redefine expectations, disrupt industries. Being mediocre isn't an option.
values.example_question: Tell me about a time you weren't satisfied with the status quo and pushed for something better.

values.name: Dream Team
values.tagline: We operate like a professional sports team. All-star players only.
values.description: Radical honesty, high standards, no tolerance for mediocrity. Brilliant people self-identify goals and self-direct to reach them.
what_they_look_for: Radical honesty - giving and receiving feedback
High standards for yourself and others
values.example_question: Tell me about a time you gave difficult feedback to a colleague.

values.name: Think Deeper
values.tagline: Logic, reason, and common sense prevail. We always ask: Is that true? Why?
values.description: Start with problem definition. Dive deep into details. Challenge each other to find truth. Managers must understand every detail.
what_they_look_for: Getting to root cause, not symptoms
values.example_question: Tell me about a time you disagreed with a widely-held belief on your team and were right.

values.name: Get It Done
values.tagline: We care about results. Grit, determination, and ownership.
values.description: Push through obstacles. No excuses, no politics. Full ownership start to finish. Urgency without panic.
values.example_question: Tell me about a time you delivered something under extreme pressure.

values.name: Deliver WOW
values.tagline: We build Minimum Lovable Products, not MVPs. Excellent quality is a must.
values.description: Love building great products. Simple and elegant solutions. Attention to every detail. Internal quality matters too.
values.example_question: Tell me about something you built that you're genuinely proud of.

rounds.name: System Design
rounds.focus: Production-focused, API contracts, DB schemas, failure handling

rounds.name: Team Fit
rounds.note: May have multiple team fit rounds with different teams

rounds.name: Bar Raiser (optional)
rounds.focus: Senior engineer outside hiring team, has veto power

tips: Use STAR format with specific numbers
Show ownership - 'I did X' not 'We did X'
Be direct - they value radical honesty
Ask good questions - shows genuine interest

problems.name: Load Balancer
requirements: get() - return server using Random strategy

problems.name: URL Shortener
requirements: Duplicate URLs return existing short URL

common_mistakes: Returning strings for errors instead of exceptions

behavioral.question: Walk me through your background
behavioral.assesses: Clarity, progression, why you made each move

behavioral.question: Why are you leaving your current role?
Tell me about a project you delivered end-to-end
Describe a time you disagreed with your manager
Tell me about a failure or mistake
How do you handle conflicting priorities?
Tell me about a time you received tough feedback
How do you ensure quality in your work?
Where do you see yourself in 2-3 years?

bar_raiser: You mentioned X in an earlier round - tell me more
Walk me through the technical details of how you solved Y
What would you do differently if you had to do it again?
If you joined and found the codebase was a mess, what would you do?
How would you handle a teammate who consistently misses deadlines?
Tell me about a time you had to choose between quality and speed
What's the biggest risk we'd be taking by hiring you?

about_team: What does the engineering team I'd join own end-to-end?
What's the biggest technical challenge the team is facing?
How are technical decisions made on the team?
about_culture: How long have you been at Revolut and what keeps you here?
What does 'Never Settle' look like in practice on this team?
about_growth: What does career progression look like for engineers?
How do you give feedback to engineers?
